owner_operator_stated: Cameo Dentistry was founded in 1992 by Dr. David Ho and Dr. Michelle Tran (Streamwood location), who later opened a second office in Bloomingdale (this record's location).
notes: vendor_website_hint 'Associateddentalcare.Net' was wrong. Corroborated site is cameodentistry.com: a page hosted on that domain is titled 'Get a Brighter, Healthier Smile with a Dental Cleaning Exam at Cameo Dentistry in Bloomingdale, IL - Call 630-893-5253 Today!' embedding the exact record phone number, and multiple independent listings (Yelp, search index) confirm the exact address 70 Stratford Dr, Bloomingdale, IL 60108 for this same site/business. WebFetch repeatedly failed to render usable page content for cameodentistry.com/contact-us, /meet-our-providers, and the homepage (returned only truncated headers), so the current on-site doctor roster could not be directly read; founders Dr. David Ho and Dr. Michelle Tran per search-indexed content. Cameo Dentistry operates two locations (Bloomingdale + Streamwood) -- do not confuse with the unrelated 'Cameo Dental Specialists' oral surgery group (cameods.com) that surfaced in hiring searches. No own-site careers page found; provider_count_website reflects only the two founders identified, not the full current on-site team (record provider_count=3).

public_practice_name: OWL Pediatric Dentistry (formerly McElroy Pediatric Dentistry, Ltd.)
owner_operator_stated: The current operator at this address is 'OWL Pediatric Dentistry' (Oral Wellness for Life); its roster (Dr. Jennifer Campbell, Dr. Catherine Murphy, Dr. Rachel Williams) does not include a Dr. McElroy. Third-party sources (DirectDental, Bloomingdale Chamber of Commerce) explicitly label OWL 'Formally McElroy Pediatric Dentistry,' i.e. a rebrand/succession at the same address and phone as the record entity 'MCELROY PEDIATRIC DENISTRY, LTD.'
notes: SUCCESSOR RULE applies. vendor_website_hint 'Mcelroydds.Com' resolves to a legacy site (still branded 'McElroy Pediatric Dentistry', partly hosted on an elementor.cloud builder domain) showing the SAME address (231 S. Gary Avenue, Bloomingdale, IL 60108) and phone (630-351-4440) as the record but listing no doctor names. That same address/phone is now operated under the name 'OWL Pediatric Dentistry' (owldentistry.com, address shown as '231 South Gary Avenue, Suite 105'), whose current named roster does not include a Dr. McElroy. Search results (Yelp, DirectDental, Bloomingdale Chamber) confirm OWL is explicitly labeled 'Formally McElroy Pediatric Dentistry' -- a rebrand at the same location, founded 1982, with Dr. Jennifer Campbell noted as having joined in 1993 (pre-dating the rebrand). Because the current operating entity's name and doctor roster differ from the record's named entity 'MCELROY PEDIATRIC DENISTRY, LTD.' (no McElroy present), this is flagged ownership_conflict per the successor rule.

Third-party directories name Dr. Jabal R. Patel, DMD, as CEO/lead dentist, matching the record entity, but this is not confirmed on the official site itself, so ownership_evidence_status is no_statement rather than consistent. notes: vendor_website_hint 'Neufamilydental.Com' confirmed correct via exact address match: 573 Dundee Ave, East Dundee, IL 60118 shown on the practice's own contact page. Note: that contact page lists phone (847) 230-9143, differing from the record's (847) 426-3000; a separate third-party directory (CareCredit) ties (847) 426-3000 to this exact address and this same website (neufamilydental.com), so this is treated as the same practice (address match alone satisfies the corroboration rule) rather than a conflict -- likely a secondary/marketing line vs. the direct office line. A search-result snippet (not independently confirmed via direct page fetch) also names Dr. Anthony Varchetto and Dr. Don Froehlke as associated dentists, but the Meet-the-Doctors page as directly fetched profiles only Dr. Gregory Neu, so provider_count_website reflects only the confirmed name (record provider_count=2).
